message:
refactor: Major codebase improvements across all modules

- Enhanced CLI and configuration handling
- Improved mathematical modules: iterated function systems,
  knot theoretic programs, matrix exponential gauge learning,
  nonstandard analysis, octonionic quaternionic signal flow,
  ordinal schedules, reversible computation, simplicial complexes,
  surreal numbers, tropical geometry, ultrametric worlds
- Updated nanochat modules: AdamW, braid/fractal/gauge attention,
  checkpoint manager, common utilities, configurator, core eval,
  dataloader, dataset, engine, execution, GPT variants, HOSS optimizer,
  kernels, loss eval, model utils, Muon optimizer, neuroscore/viz,
  ordinal scheduler, quaternion attention, report, reversible blocks,
  serve, simplicial/surreal/test_tropical/tokenizer modules,
  torch imports, training, tropical/ultrametric attention
- Updated scripts: benchmarks, CMA-ES, verification
- Enhanced test suite: demos, mathematical correctness/properties,
  practical utility, runner
- Improved utilities

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
